creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
got a patch to fix this.

see <https://wwws.clamav.net/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=2201>

patch:

diff -bBru /tmp/clamav/ ./
diff -bBru /tmp/clamav/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /tmp/clamav/Makefile    2010-08-13 07:29:48.000000000 -0400
+++ ./Makefile    2010-08-15 14:55:02.000000000 -0400
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@

  PORTNAME=    clamav
  DISTVERSION=    0.96.2
+PORTREVISION=    1
  CATEGORIES=    security
  MASTER_SITES=    SF

diff -bBru /tmp/clamav/files/patch-libclamav-bytecode_detect.c 
./files/patch-libclamav-bytecode_detect.c
--- /tmp/clamav/files/patch-libclamav-bytecode_detect.c    2010-08-15 
14:41:21.000000000 -0400
+++ ./files/patch-libclamav-bytecode_detect.c    2010-08-15 
15:07:04.000000000 -0400
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- libclamav/bytecode_detect.c.orig    2010-08-10 06:49:11.000000000 -0400
++++ libclamav/bytecode_detect.c    2010-08-15 14:58:29.000000000 -0400
+@@ -185,6 +185,7 @@
+     /* -- Detect arch -- */
+     CHECK_ARCH(i386);
+     else CHECK_ARCH(x86_64);
++    else if (!strcmp(TARGET_ARCH_TYPE,"amd64")) env->arch = arch_x86_64;
+     else if (!strcmp(TARGET_ARCH_TYPE,"ppc")) env->arch = 
arch_ppc32;/* llvm will fix ppc64 */
+     else CHECK_ARCH(arm);
+     else CHECK_ARCH(sparc);
+

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
